phases.title: Your idea
phases.subtitle: Write it like you'd tell a human. No formats, no templates.

phases.title: AI writes the script
phases.subtitle: Claude analyzes your prompt and generates a complete script with voices, music, effects and timing.

phases.title: 23+ voices choose their role
phases.subtitle: Real voices automatically selected based on tone and character.

phases.title: Smart timing and mixing
phases.subtitle: Volume, effects, silences and layers adjust automatically for professional sound.

jobPage.errorDescription: An error occurred while generating your audio. Please try again in a few seconds.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay for what you produce. Cancel anytime.
pricing.priceNote: Prices exclude VAT. Paid credits renew monthly.
pricing.bottomCtaTitle: Produce your first audio for free

features: 10 voices in Spanish, Latin and English
27+ voices in Spanish, Latin and English

faqs.a: Each production has a base cost of 10 credits, plus 5 credits per generated voice. A production with 2 voices costs 20 credits, one with 8 voices costs 50. You pay proportionally to what you use.
Unused credits are kept until the end of the billing cycle. They don't roll over to the next month.

faqs.q: What is the advanced voice model?
faqs.a: The free plan uses a fast voice model with good quality. Pro and Studio plans use a more expressive, natural model with support for 70+ languages. The difference is especially noticeable in dialogues and long narrations.
Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll keep access until the end of the billed period.

faqs.q: What happens if I run out of credits?
faqs.a: You'll need to wait until your credits renew next month, or upgrade to a higher plan for more credits immediately.

faqs.q: Can I use the audio commercially?
faqs.a: Paid plans include a commercial license. You can use the generated audio in ads, podcasts, YouTube videos, social media and any commercial project.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: We accept credit cards, Apple Pay and Google Pay through Stripe. All transactions are encrypted and secure.
